# Handcannon
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Handcannon&prop=wikitext

{{ItemInfo
| name = Handcannon
| slot = bow
| tier = UT
| rarity = Primal
| desc = The legendary firearm forged from hard steel and demonic blood containing mighty power.

| rof = 95
| range = 
| projSpeed = 160
| lifetime = 700
| minDmg = 100
| maxDmg = 125
| shots = 8
| arcgap = 6

| effects = yes
| multihit = yes
| pierce = 

| legendary = 1    
| lootbag = white
|dropsFrom = is currently only obtainable from the L.Bandito, in Galactic Zones|primal = Overwhelmed With Power:<br/>You have a 0.01% chance to become drunk for 2 seconds on hit|range2 = 12}}
<noinclude>
[[Category:Bows]]
{{NavBows}}</noinclude>
